title: Anathallis dryadum
intro: Anathallis dryadum, also known as the 'Dryad's Anathallis', is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Anathallis dryadum contains bioactive constituents, including phenolic compounds and alkaloids, that contribute to its therapeutic properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include infusions and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory and inflammatory conditions.
taxonomy: Anathallis dryadum is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Epidendreae. The genus Anathallis is itself a member of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. This species, Anathallis dryadum, is native to Central and South America. It is a small, epiphytic orchid that grows in humid forests and woodlands.
